name: @skylab/glm-plugin-cc
description: Claude Code plugin: GLM reviewer via 智谱 BigModel (OpenAI-compatible HTTP). Scaffold derived from openai/codex-plugin-cc (Apache-2.0).

scripts.check: node --check scripts/glm-companion.mjs && node --check scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs && for f in scripts/lib/*.mjs; do node --check $f || exit 1; done
